glosses.zh-Hans: 女退休人员; 女退休者
glosses.yue: 退休女士; 女退休人士
glosses.vi: nữ hưu trí; người về hưu (nữ)
glosses.ja: 退職した女性; 女性の年金受給者

sentences.target: Ich helfe der Pensionistin mit den Einkäufen.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈhɛlfə deːɐ̯ pɛnzi̯oˈnɪstɪn mɪt deːn ˈaɪ̯nˌkɔɪ̯fən./

translations.de: Ich helfe der Pensionistin mit den Einkäufen.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈhɛlfə deːɐ̯ pɛnzi̯oˈnɪstɪn mɪt deːn ˈaɪ̯nˌkɔɪ̯fən./
translations.en: I help the retired woman with the shopping.
translations.es: Ayudo a la jubilada con la compra.
translations.fr: J’aide la retraitée avec les courses.
translations.it: Aiuto la pensionata con la spesa.
translations.ko: 저는 은퇴한 여성분이 장 보는 것을 도와요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我帮这位退休的女士买菜。
translations.yue: 我幫嗰位退休嘅女士買餸。
translations.pt: Eu ajudo a aposentada com as compras.
translations.vi: Tôi giúp người phụ nữ đã nghỉ hưu mua sắm.
translations.nl: Ik help de gepensioneerde vrouw met de boodschappen.
translations.hu: Segítek a nyugdíjas nőnek a bevásárlásban.
translations.hi: मैं रिटायर्ड महिला की खरीदारी में मदद करता हूँ।
translations.el: Βοηθάω τη συνταξιούχα με τα ψώνια.
translations.nb: Jeg hjelper den pensjonerte kvinnen med innkjøpene.
translations.id: Saya membantu wanita pensiunan itu berbelanja.
translations.sv: Jag hjälper den pensionerade kvinnan med att handla.
translations.ro: O ajut pe pensionară cu cumpărăturile.
translations.da: Jeg hjælper den pensionerede kvinde med indkøbene.
translations.ja: 私は退職した女性の買い物を手伝います。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the finite verb 'helfe'.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular. 'helfen' selects a dative complement (indirect object).
Definite article, dative feminine singular; introduces the NP 'der Pensionistin' (indirect object of 'helfe').
Common noun, feminine, singular, dative; head of the NP functioning as indirect object of 'helfe'.
Preposition governing dative; introduces the PP 'mit den Einkäufen' (comitative/instrumental adjunct).
Definite article, dative plural; determiner of 'Einkäufen' within the PP governed by 'mit'.
Common noun, plural, dative; object of the preposition 'mit'. Refers to purchases/shopping.

sentences.target: Die Pensionistin geht jeden Morgen spazieren.

translations.de: Die Pensionistin geht jeden Morgen spazieren.
translations.en: The retired woman goes for a walk every morning.
translations.es: La jubilada sale a caminar todas las mañanas.
translations.fr: La retraitée se promène tous les matins.
translations.it: La pensionata va a camminare ogni mattina.
translations.zh-Hans: 这位退休的女士每天早上去散步。
translations.yue: 嗰位退休嘅女士每日朝早都去散步。
translations.ru: Пенсионерка каждое утро ходит на прогулку.
translations.pt: A aposentada caminha todas as manhãs.
translations.tr: Emekli kadın her sabah yürüyüşe çıkar.
translations.vi: Người phụ nữ đã nghỉ hưu đi dạo mỗi sáng.
translations.ar: تخرج المرأة المتقاعدة للمشي كل صباح.
translations.nl: De gepensioneerde vrouw gaat elke ochtend wandelen.
translations.hu: A nyugdíjas nő minden reggel sétálni megy.
translations.hi: वह रिटायर्ड महिला हर सुबह टहलने जाती है।
translations.pl: Emerytka codziennie rano chodzi na spacer.
translations.el: Η συνταξιούχα πηγαίνει βόλτα κάθε πρωί.
translations.nb: Den pensjonerte kvinnen går tur hver morgen.
translations.id: Wanita pensiunan itu berjalan kaki setiap pagi.
translations.sv: Den pensionerade kvinnan tar en promenad varje morgon.
translations.ro: Pensionara iese la plimbare în fiecare dimineață.
translations.cs: Důchodkyně chodí každé ráno na procházku.
translations.da: Den pensionerede kvinde går en tur hver morgen.
translations.ja: その退職した女性は毎朝散歩に行きます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative feminine singular; determiner of 'Pensionistin' (subject).
Common noun, feminine, singular, nominative; subject of 'geht'.
Finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular. Part of the separable verb collocation 'spazieren gehen' ('to go for a walk'); combines with the particle 'spazieren'.
Determiner, masculine accusative singular; modifies 'Morgen' in a temporal accusative-of-time construction ('every morning').
Common noun, masculine, accusative singular; time adverbial ('jeden Morgen').
Separable verb particle in the fixed expression 'spazieren gehen'; completes the verbal meaning ('to go for a walk').

sentences.target: Mein Nachbar hilft der Pensionistin im Garten.
sentences.reading: /maɪ̯n ˈnaχbaʁ hɪlft deːɐ̯ pɛnzi̯oˈnɪstɪn ɪm ˈgaʁtn̩./

translations.de: Mein Nachbar hilft der Pensionistin im Garten.
translations.ipa: /maɪ̯n ˈnaχbaʁ hɪlft deːɐ̯ pɛnzi̯oˈnɪstɪn ɪm ˈgaʁtn̩./
translations.en: My neighbor helps the retired woman in the garden.
translations.es: Mi vecino ayuda a la jubilada en el jardín.
translations.fr: Mon voisin aide la retraitée dans le jardin.
translations.it: Il mio vicino aiuta la pensionata in giardino.
translations.ko: 제 이웃은 정원에서 은퇴한 여성분을 도와요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的邻居在花园里帮这位退休的女士。
translations.yue: 我鄰居喺花園度幫嗰位退休嘅女士。
translations.ru: Мой сосед помогает пенсионерке в саду.
translations.pt: Meu vizinho ajuda a aposentada no jardim.
translations.tr: Komşum bahçede emekli kadına yardım ediyor.
translations.vi: Hàng xóm của tôi giúp người phụ nữ đã nghỉ hưu trong vườn.
translations.ar: جاري يساعد المرأة المتقاعدة في الحديقة.
translations.nl: Mijn buurman helpt de gepensioneerde vrouw in de tuin.
translations.uk: Мій сусід допомагає пенсіонерці в саду.
translations.hu: A szomszédom segít a nyugdíjas nőnek a kertben.
translations.hi: मेरा पड़ोसी बगीचे में उस रिटायर्ड महिला की मदद करता है।
translations.pl: Mój sąsiad pomaga emerytce w ogrodzie.
translations.el: Ο γείτονάς μου βοηθά τη συνταξιούχα στον κήπο.
translations.nb: Naboen min hjelper den pensjonerte kvinnen i hagen.
translations.id: Tetangga saya membantu wanita pensiunan itu di kebun.
translations.sv: Min granne hjälper den pensionerade kvinnan i trädgården.
translations.ro: Vecinul meu o ajută pe pensionară în grădină.
translations.cs: Můj soused pomáhá důchodkyni na zahradě.
translations.da: Min nabo hjælper den pensionerede kvinde i haven.
translations.ja: 近所の人は庭で退職した女性を手伝います。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, 1st person singular; agrees with 'Nachbar' (masculine nominative singular).
Common noun, masculine, singular, nominative; subject of 'hilft'.
Finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular (irregular stem vowel). Takes a dative complement ('der Pensionistin').
Definite article, dative feminine singular; introduces 'Pensionistin' as indirect object of 'hilft'.

Contraction of 'in dem'; preposition governing dative. Introduces a locative PP ('im Garten').
Common noun, masculine, singular, dative; object of the preposition 'im', marking location.

sentences.target: Ich kenne die Pensionistin aus dem Haus.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈkɛnə diː pɛnzi̯oˈnɪstɪn aʊ̯s deːm haʊ̯s./

translations.de: Ich kenne die Pensionistin aus dem Haus.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈkɛnə diː pɛnzi̯oˈnɪstɪn aʊ̯s deːm haʊ̯s./
translations.en: I know the retired woman from the building.
translations.es: Conozco a la jubilada del edificio.
translations.fr: Je connais la retraitée de l’immeuble.
translations.ko: 저는 이 건물의 은퇴한 여성분을 알아요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我认识这栋楼里的退休女士。
translations.yue: 我喺呢棟樓識嗰位退休嘅女士。
translations.ru: Я знаю пенсионерку из нашего дома.
translations.pt: Eu conheço a aposentada do prédio.
translations.vi: Tôi biết người phụ nữ đã nghỉ hưu trong tòa nhà.
translations.nl: Ik ken de gepensioneerde vrouw uit het gebouw.
translations.uk: Я знаю пенсіонерку з нашого будинку.
translations.hu: Ismerem a nyugdíjas nőt a házból.
translations.hi: मैं उस रिटायर्ड महिला को इस इमारत से जानता हूँ।
translations.el: Ξέρω τη συνταξιούχα από την πολυκατοικία.
translations.nb: Jeg kjenner den pensjonerte kvinnen fra bygget.
translations.id: Saya kenal wanita pensiunan itu dari gedung ini.
translations.sv: Jag känner den pensionerade kvinnan från huset.
translations.ro: O cunosc pe pensionară din bloc.
translations.da: Jeg kender den pensionerede kvinde fra bygningen.
translations.ja: 私はこの建物の退職した女性を知っています。
